title: Minimum Number of Days to Make m Bouquets
hints: First check if total flowers needed exceeds array length. If so, return -1 immediately.
Notice that if you can make m bouquets by day d, you can also do it by day d+1. This monotonicity suggests binary search on the answer.
For a fixed day, count consecutive bloomed flowers to see how many bouquets you can form. Use this check inside your binary search.
